edges.description: Dr. Maria Rodriguez leads the Quantum Computing Laboratory at MIT.
Dr. Maria Rodriguez has been conducting research on quantum error correction since 2018.
Dr. James Lee is a member of Dr. Maria Rodriguez's team at the Quantum Computing Laboratory.
Dr. Fatima Abbas is a member of Dr. Maria Rodriguez's team at the Quantum Computing Laboratory.
The Quantum Computing Laboratory is funded by a $10 million grant from the National Science Foundation.
The National Science Foundation awarded the grant to the Quantum Computing Laboratory in 2020.
The funding has enabled the acquisition of quantum computers manufactured by QuantumTech Industries.
QuantumTech Industries specializes in quantum hardware.
Dr. Maria Rodriguez co-authored a paper with Professor Chen Wei.
The paper published by Dr. Maria Rodriguez and Professor Chen Wei is in Nature Physics.
The MIT laboratory collaborates with Cambridge University.
The MIT laboratory collaborates with the Max Planck Institute.
The MIT laboratory collaborates with RIKEN.
